input: The document states that Anthropic was founded by Dario and Daniela Amodei.
context: Anthropic is an AI safety company founded in 2021 by Dario Amodei and Daniela Amodei, along with several other former OpenAI researchers.

input: The policy states that employees 'may choose to work remotely up to three days per week.'
context: As per the updated policy, remote work is not mandatory; employees may choose to work remotely up to three days per week.

input: The product launched in early 2023 after a two-year development period.
context: After two years of development, the product was officially launched in Q1 2023 to great market reception.

input: According to the study, 47% of participants reported measurable improvement after 12 weeks.
context: In the clinical study, 47% of the 200 participants reported measurable improvement after 12 weeks of treatment.

input: Since the study is correlational, it cannot establish that screen time causes sleep disorders.
context: A correlational study found an association between higher screen time and reduced sleep duration in children aged 6-12. Researchers noted that causation cannot be established from this data.

input: The document does not specify when or whether Acme Corp plans to go public.
context: Acme Corp remains a privately held company. Executives have stated they have no immediate plans for an IPO.

input: CFO Roberto Alves presented the quarterly results, which showed 8% revenue growth.
context: The quarterly results, which showed 8% revenue growth, were presented by CFO Roberto Alves.

input: O relatório aborda o impacto ambiental de setores econômicos no Brasil, mas não cita um percentual específico de emissões da América Latina.
context: O relatório analisa o impacto ambiental de diferentes setores econômicos no Brasil, com foco na indústria agropecuária e seu papel nas emissões nacionais.

input: The CEO expressed cautious optimism but did not provide specific revenue forecasts.
context: In the earnings call, the CEO expressed cautious optimism about growth prospects but declined to provide specific revenue forecasts for the coming year.

input: The survey showed that 62% of respondents supported the regulation, while 31% opposed it.
context: Survey results revealed that 62% of respondents supported the proposed regulation, while 31% opposed it and 7% were undecided.

input: The framework described is LangChain, not LangGraph.
context: The document introduces LangChain, a framework for building applications with large language models through composable components.

context: The company currently operates from its headquarters in New York, with a recently opened office in London.
